The TradeMatch 9-Layer Trust Framework is the most thorough vetting system ever deployed in the UK domestic trades market. Every tradesperson who carries our Verified badge has passed all nine â€” automatically, with no exceptions.

Why 9 Layers?

One weak link breaks the whole chain.

Most trade platforms run one or two checks â€” a self-declared licence upload, maybe a basic credit check. The 9-Layer Trust Framework was built from the ground up to close every gap that leads to fraud, injury, poor workmanship and homeowner regret. Fail any layer and your application is rejected â€” full stop.

All-or-nothing enforcement
There are no partial passes. A tradesperson who passes 8 of 9 layers is rejected. The framework is binary.
Automated & live-checked
Six of the nine layers query live government and regulatory databases directly â€” not uploaded screenshots, not PDF scans.
Continuous, not one-time
Every credential is re-checked automatically every 12 months. A lapsed licence or expired insurance triggers same-day suspension.
The 9 Layers

Every layer. Every time.

Hover any layer to see how it works. All nine must pass simultaneously â€” one failure rejects the entire application.

01
Identity Verification
Government-issued photo ID verified biometrically and cross-referenced against HMRC records and CIFAS fraud registers in real time.
Live API
02
Trade Licence Check
Live queries to 15+ regulatory body APIs: Gas Safe, NICEIC, NAPIT, OFTEC, ELECSA, WaterSafe and more. Confirmed active â€” not self-declared.
15 APIs
03
Insurance Validation
Certificate scanned with OCR. Insurer contacted directly to confirm active cover, minimum ÂŁ2M public liability, correct trade category.
Min ÂŁ2M
04
DBS Criminal Record Check
Standard DBS for all trades. Enhanced DBS (including barred-list check) required for work in homes with vulnerable or elderly occupants.
Enhanced
05
Competence Card Verification
CSCS, SkillCard or trade equivalent verified with the issuing body. NVQ Level 2 minimum for wet trades, plumbing and structural categories.
CSCS
06
Portfolio Review
A TradeMatch assessor personally reviews five or more project photos. Quality, finish standard, complexity and category alignment all evaluated.
Manual
07
Reference Validation
Minimum two previous clients contacted directly â€” by phone or email â€” to confirm work quality, reliability, timekeeping and conduct.
2+ Refs
08
Right to Work in the UK
Biometric or documentary evidence of legal right to work verified in full compliance with Home Office guidance. No exemptions granted.
Home Office
09
Annual Re-Verification
All nine layers re-checked automatically every 12 months. Any lapsed credential triggers immediate suspension until restored. Zero tolerance.

1
Layer One

Identity & fraud prevention

Every applicant submits government-issued photo ID which is verified via biometric scoring engine, NFC chip reading on e-passports, and simultaneous cross-reference against HMRC and Companies House records.

NFC e-passport scanning
Highest-grade biometric chip reading for passports issued after 2006.
CIFAS fraud register screening
Every NI number and name checked against the national fraud prevention database.
Right to Work (Layer 8 pre-screen)
Legal right to work is partially assessed at this stage and fully confirmed in Layer 8.
Minimum required
ÂŁ2M
Public liability
3
Layer Three

Insurance & liability cover

We never accept uploaded PDFs at face value. The certificate is scanned with OCR to extract values, then the insurer is contacted directly to confirm active cover, the correct named insured, and that the cover amount meets our tiered minimum for the trade category.

Tiered minimums by trade
Structural builders ÂŁ5M. Gas engineers ÂŁ2M. Decorators and handymen ÂŁ1M.
30-day renewal alerts
Tradesperson automatically notified before expiry. Failure to renew triggers suspension.
Escrow payment freeze
If insurance lapses mid-project, payment is frozen until cover is reinstated or dispute resolved.
DBS checks completed
14,200+
Standard + Enhanced
4
Layer Four

DBS & criminal record screening

Standard DBS checks are mandatory for every tradesperson. Where the work involves entry to homes with elderly, disabled or vulnerable residents, an Enhanced DBS check with barred-list disclosure is required â€” no exceptions, no alternative routes.

Standard DBS â€” all trades
Police National Computer check covering convictions, cautions, reprimands and final warnings.
Enhanced DBS â€” vulnerable households
Full Adults' and Children's Barred List check via the Disclosure and Barring Service.
3-year renewal cycle
Re-checked every 36 months, or immediately upon any reported on-platform incident.
Min project photos
5
Human-reviewed every time
6â€“7
Layers Six & Seven

Portfolio & references

No algorithm can assess craftsmanship. A TradeMatch assessor personally reviews a sample of past project images, evaluating finish quality, complexity and standards alignment. We then contact a minimum of two previous clients directly â€” not form-submitted reviews, but actual calls or emails.

Minimum 5 project photos
Each assessed for finish quality, health & safety standards and category-appropriate complexity.
Direct reference contact
We reach out to previous clients directly â€” tradesperson-submitted reviews carry no weight in this layer.
Conduct & reliability scored
Timekeeping, communication, site cleanliness and professional behaviour all included in the reference assessment.
How We Stack Up

TradeMatch vs the rest

Every other platform we assessed performs between 1 and 3 checks. The 9-Layer Trust Framework is not an industry standard â€” it's a benchmark we set deliberately to be impossible to match without infrastructure investment.

Layer 9 â€” Always On

The framework never sleeps.

Verification isn't a one-time event. Our monitoring infrastructure runs continuous checks across all credential types, so every tradesperson with a Verified badge is actually verified â€” today, right now.

Full re-check every 12 months
All nine layers re-processed automatically on the anniversary of each tradesperson's approval date.
Expiry alerts at 30 & 7 days
Insurance and licence expiry warnings are sent at 30, 14 and 7 days. Miss all three â€” automatic suspension.
Daily register polling
Gas Safe, NICEIC and NAPIT registers polled every 24 hours. Removal from any register triggers same-day suspension.
